name: exovia-neurocanvas
description: Offline-first visual knowledge explorer and auditable human-AI secondary brain.

scripts.verify: npm run validate && npm run verify:static && npm run readiness && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:android:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
